item.description:
• Fixed a launch-time storm of macOS Keychain permission prompts. The Cockpit agent panel and the compute dial read your provider key during view setup, so macOS could ask to use your confidential information repeatedly on launch. Those reads are now deferred off the launch path.
  • Also fixes a related side effect where the dismissed prompts could steal focus and jump the sidebar from Home to Cockpit on their own.

• Cockpit — new prototyping-lab pillar (Workspace · Environment · ComputeTarget · Run) with a compute dial that scales from local to serverless GPU (RunPod / Modal).
  • Notebox — editor-first marimo notebooks + SQL stack, engine controls, and playful native loaders.
  • Agentic memory — local-first memory backbone (vector + temporal knowledge graph), private and on-device.
  • CockpitAgent — Ask / Edit agent with gated tool-calling.
  • Learn: Reinforcement Learning — new 24-challenge track (bandits → PPO/SAC).
  • Discover / Library / Code polish, playlist import, and a sticky-cursor fix.

• Discover — multi-source literature search (Semantic Scholar, arXiv, OpenAlex, Europe PMC, bioRxiv/medRxiv) with a field switcher, trending feed, and an in-app paper page (AI TL;DR, BibTeX, offline task/method tags).
  • Compare — bring-your-own-key model arena: one prompt across many models side by side, live cost meter, local & Hugging Face router models, saved prompt sets.
  • Run — write & run Python/shell in a container, run lm-eval / inspect-ai benchmarks against any endpoint, now including serverless GPUs (Hugging Face, RunPod).
  • Deep Research — reads full open-access papers (quoted & cited) with an optional skeptical critique pass.
  • Learn — implement-it-yourself ML challenges plus a new data-cleaning track.
  • Agents (MCP) — bundled MCP server for paper search; one-click connect from Settings.
  • Editorial gold-rule redesign, Light/Dark/System toggle, Now Playing bar.

• Community wall (Beta) — share & discover study packs with no server or account (Nostr index + IPFS files); subjects, communities, upvotes.
  • Paper → podcast — multi-speaker audio from any paper.
  • Redesigned Home — a single Spotlight-style command bar; modes reordered to Stream / Research / Download.
  • In-app Help guide, relay reconnection fix, mastery board, focus timer.
